title: aglaia aquea
intro: Aglaia aquea, also known as the yellow mangosteen or golden mangosteen, is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Aglaia aquea has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential anticancer properties. In herbal preparations, Aglaia aquea is often used in combination with other plants to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used as a topical treatment for skin conditions and wounds.
